description.value:
This technique allows the user control over a mass of paper at his disposal. The swarm occupies a 5 ft. wide by 10 ft. long space. It moves at the user's will within the technique's range at a flying speed of 50 feet with Perfect maneuverability. If it flies through a square occupied by a creature(s), said creature suffers 2d6 points of slashing damage, and is allowed a reflex save to take only half damage.

The swarm is completely unaffected by attacks that target a single creature, has a Defense of 18 and 10 hit points. It cannot be caught flat-footed, entangled, stunned, poisoned, suffer ability drain or damage or affected by any effect requiring a will or fortitude save. It shares the user's Reflex save, however, and evasion or improved evasion if he has it.

The swarm will continue to move according to the user's will until it is either destroyed, leaves the technique's range, the user dies or stop concentrating.

This technique cannot solidify more than one Chakrabearing object (like an exploding tag or advanced seal) among the objects it affects. If such an object hits a creature, they have a -4 Reflex save against the object, unless it is removed before it activates.

Requires: 7 ranks Craft (Visual Arts)

Material Focus: 25 pages of paper.
